weight.note: Up to 40% heavier than competitive models for longer service life

installation_requirements.floor_design: Sturdy base design spreads weight evenly

specifications.runway_construction: Segmented box-girder construction similar to bridge spans
specifications.synchronization: Closed-loop hydraulic/mechanical system - level within 1/8 inch
specifications.bearing_type: Self-lubricating composite bearings with chrome-plated pivot pins

features: Segmented box-girder runway construction prevents sagging or twisting
Patented AOS Energy Absorbing System eliminates sliding legs
Surface, flush, or recessed pit mounting options
Available in fully galvanized steel for wash bay environments

optional_equipment.description: Wheels-free service for brakes, tires, and axles

certifications: Manufactured in compliance with ALI, ANSI, ASME, AISI, ASTM, ASA, NEC, AWG, NEMA
Meets current national ANSI code for lifts
safety_features: Level within 1/8 inch regardless of weight distribution
Hydraulic safeties with pressure-compensated flow control valves
Laser cut high strength T-1 steel safety latch racks
Dual high-resolution chain-driven encoders monitor lift movement 60 times per second
notes: Heaviest-built vertical rise lift in the world per manufacturer
